---
title: "A very long slug that mirrors real production post slugs for overflow testing"
description: "Fixture with a 70+ character slug - guards the mobile horizontal-overflow regression in the post-page eyebrow."
date: "2026-07-01"
tags: ["Testing"]
---

## Why this fixture exists

The `$ cat blog/<slug>.md` eyebrow renders the slug as one unbreakable mono
token. Real slugs run 60+ characters; without `break-all` they force
horizontal page scroll on phones. This post keeps that failure mode covered.

Also a long unbroken URL to exercise prose overflow-wrap:
https://example.com/a/very/long/path/that/would/widen/the/page/if/overflow-wrap/were/missing/from/the/prose-post/container/style
